overview.description: Czech AI company developing proprietary neural-network-based conversational AI (METILA®) for organizational management, HR, healthcare, finance, and security
overview.description_long: Cyber Global is a Prague-based AI company founded by investor and technologist Gustav Mistrík, specializing in the development and commercialization of METILA® — a proprietary qualitative artificial neural network (ANN) for deep-learning-based human dialog understanding. Unlike LLM-based systems, METILA® uses a custom mathematical topology inspired by the human brain to understand communication context, behavioral patterns, and socio-cultural attributes. Applications span organizational behavior optimization, CEO mentoring, HR prescreening, chatbots, and AI consulting. Research began in 2000, with the first commercial deployment at a Microsoft call center in 2008. The company offers consulting services, a SaaS chatbot platform (METILAbot / METILA® Interactive), and training/education on AI and neural networks.
overview.tagline: Advanced artificial intelligence based on qualitative neural networks. METILA® transactional synthesis since 2000.

history.origin_story: Gustav Mistrík, a technology investor with a military background in cybernetics, built and sold several tech companies (including a banking software firm sold to a German company after PwC due diligence). He then founded a technology incubator, within which he launched the METILA® neural network research project in 2000. After years of basic scientific research (2001–2004) and applied validation (2006–2007), the first commercial use occurred at a Microsoft call center in 2008.

key_milestones.event: Research on algorithmization of human communication begins
Basic scientific research on ANN architecture starts (concludes 2004)
Applied research and development of technological demonstrator ANN METIX®
Validation of ANN METILA® on securities trading (through 2007)
First commercial use at Microsoft call center for screening
METILA® applied in healthcare (prescreening, audit, training)
METILA® integrated with humanoid robot NAO
METILA® connected to Internet of Things (intelligent voice control)
METILA® used in security and military sectors
Book 'Jak inteligence mluví s lidmi' (How AI Talks to People) published
METILA® Interactive application launched (self-service chatbot builder)
Listed on Czech National AI Platform (CNAIP); participated in FUTURE SKILLS 2025 conference

notable_people.name: Gustav Mistrík
notable_people.note: Author of two AI books: 'Transactional Synthesis METILA®' (2016) and 'How Artificial Intelligence Talks to People' (2021); military background in Cybernetics and Automated Control; MBA; sold previous banking software company to German public company

metadata.notes: Company was founded as a research/incubator project in 2000 by Gustav Mistrík; legal entity (s.r.o.) registration date not found. METILA® is a proprietary qualitative ANN system independent of mainstream LLMs. Company is very small (likely 1-10 employees) — essentially a solo founder / boutique firm. No Glassdoor or LinkedIn presence found. Business model blends product (SaaS chatbot, METILACITY®) with consulting and training services.
